title: phacelia heterophylla f. ophitidis
intro: Phacelia heterophylla f. ophitidis, also known as Ophitidis phacelia, is a subspecies of the Phacelia heterophylla plant, which is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ophitidis phacelia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Phacelia heterophylla f. ophitidis include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
